scripts.build: npm --workspace pi/packages/ai run build && npm --workspace pi/packages/agent run build && npm --workspace pi/packages/tui run build && npm --workspace apps/widi-pi run build
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings apps/widi-pi/src apps/widi-pi/tests apps/widi-pi/docs && tsgo --noEmit -p apps/widi-pi/tsconfig.json
